findings.title: DNS pinning dispatcher behavior lacks direct unit-level coverage
findings.impact: Pinned DNS protections are active, but missing direct agent behavior tests increases regression risk during refactors.
findings.minimal_fix: Add direct createPinnedDnsAgent tests (host mismatch/family/all lookup) and dispatcher wiring assertions in scheduler tests.

findings.title: Refresh worker retry and stale-claim reclaim flows are not comprehensively tested
findings.impact: Queue retry/backoff edge cases could regress without fast signal.
findings.minimal_fix: Add tests for stale claim timeout reclaim, nextRetryAt progression, and max-attempt terminal handling.

findings.title: Upload confirm is coupled to refresh enqueue success
findings.impact: Transient enqueue failure causes full upload failure, preserving consistency but reducing write availability.
findings.minimal_fix: Consider outbox or asynchronous retry design if business policy prefers accepting uploads during queue turbulence.
